KB001 - VPN Disconnecting Frequently
Description
Users experience repeated VPN disconnections after login affecting access to internal systems.
Symptoms
Frequent disconnects, inability to access internal apps, session drops.
Affected Systems
VPN Gateway, End-user devices, Network infrastructure.
Common Causes
Network instability, firewall interference, VPN client issues, server overload.
Workaround
Restart VPN client, switch network, reinstall client, use alternate protocol.
Root Cause
Gateway overload, packet loss, incompatible client version.
Resolution
Upgrade VPN client, increase gateway capacity, adjust timeout configs.
RCA Steps
Analyze logs, validate sessions, check packet loss, review firewall rules.
Prevention
Regular updates, monitoring gateway load, proactive alerts.

KB002 - Outlook Crashing on Attachments
Description
Outlook crashes when opening emails with attachments.
Symptoms
Application freeze, crash on click, error popups.
Affected Systems
Outlook client, Exchange server.
Common Causes
Add-in conflicts, corrupted PST, antivirus interference.
Workaround
Safe mode, disable add-ins, repair Office.
Root Cause
Faulty add-in or corrupt mailbox file.
Resolution
Remove faulty add-ins, repair PST, reinstall Outlook.
RCA Steps
Check event logs, analyze crash dumps, validate mailbox integrity.
Prevention
Limit add-ins, periodic mailbox maintenance.

KB003 - Access Denied to Applications
Description
Users cannot access internal applications due to permission issues.
Symptoms
Access denied errors, login failures.
Affected Systems
IAM systems, SSO, internal apps.
Common Causes
Incorrect role mapping, expired tokens, sync issues.
Workaround
Re-login, clear cache, request access.
Root Cause
IAM misconfiguration or token validation failure.
Resolution
Fix role mapping, re-sync directories.
RCA Steps
Check IAM roles, review SSO logs, validate group membership.
Prevention
Automated role audits, monitoring IAM sync.

KB004 - Laptop Performance Issues
Description
System becomes slow and overheats.
Symptoms
Lagging apps, high CPU usage, overheating.
Affected Systems
End-user devices.
Common Causes
Background processes, dust, outdated drivers.
Workaround
Restart, clean vents, update drivers.
Root Cause
Thermal throttling or resource overload.
Resolution
Optimize processes, clean hardware, update drivers.
RCA Steps
Monitor CPU, run diagnostics, check drivers.
Prevention
Regular maintenance, system monitoring.

KB005 - Teams Audio Issues
Description
Users cannot hear audio during Teams meetings.
Symptoms
No sound, device not detected.
Affected Systems
Teams app, OS audio system.
Common Causes
Wrong device selection, driver issues.
Workaround
Change audio device, restart Teams.
Root Cause
Audio misconfiguration or driver conflict.
Resolution
Update drivers, fix device mapping.
RCA Steps
Check device settings, test alternate devices.
Prevention
Standard device configs, driver updates.
